posts.text: Alexis de Tocqueville’s trip around 19th-century America took him to the frontier, to the South and, eventually, to the White House. How much of what so inspired him remains? Find out in our new six-part podcast, “Tocqueville Road Trip”  https://www.economist.com/audio/podcasts/tocqueville-road-trip?taid=6a2bb7d4fd9a320001a4952b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
